name: Outdoor Specialty Products, Inc.
business: Outdoor Specialty Products, Inc. develops, sells, and markets products in the specialty outdoor products marketplace. Its primary product is the Reel Guard, a protective cover for fishing reels. The company also continues to design and develop the Slow-Sinker product, an injection molded sinker for fishing.

exposures.sentence: From our inception in 2014 through the present, our revenues have resulted solely from sales of our proprietary Reel Guard product and our cost of sales have also related solely to that product.
